LanguageData.VTE_IndustrialCooler.description: A large Appalachia Freeze wall cooler for serious refrigeration and industrial climate control. Cold air exits one side while hot exhaust is dumped out the other.
LanguageData.VTE_IndustrialHeater.description: A large Wattz industrial heater that fits into a wall and pushes serious utility heat. It can automatically cycle to a target temperature.
LanguageData.VTE_LargeCeilingFan.description: A large Wattz ceiling fan for workshops, warehouses, and other rooms that need stronger air circulation.
LanguageData.VTE_SmallCeilingFan.description: A Wattz ceiling fan for slow, steady air circulation in smaller rooms.
LanguageData.VTE_StandingCooler.description: A freestanding Appalachia Freeze cooling unit for open rooms that need relief from summer heat without full freezer performance.
LanguageData.VTE_WallHeater.description: A Wattz wall heater that fits into a wall and keeps rooms warm without wasting floor space.
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedCooler.description: An Appalachia Freeze wall-mounted cooler for compact freezer rooms and tight utility spaces.
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedHeater.description: A compact Wattz wall-mounted heater for utility corridors, workshops, and smaller rooms that still need dependable automatic temperature control.
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedVent.description: A simple Wattz wall vent for equalizing temperatures between adjacent rooms without opening a passageway.
